rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOEL ROJAS FERNANDEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to September 10, 2014 so both petitions can be heard together. The petiiton filed by Mr. Molinari must be re-published. The proof of publication filed shows only 14 days notice, not the 15 days required by Probate Code section 8121. In addition, no later than Friday, September 5, 2014, Mr. Molinari's client shall file a declaration re additional heirs.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOEL ROJAS FERNANDEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, LIMITED APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Continued to September 10, 2014, so both petitions can be heard together. The petition filed by Mr. Molinari must be re-published. The proof of publication filed shows only 14 days notice, not the 15 days required by Probate Code section 8121. In addition, no later than Friday, September 5, 2014, Mr. Molinari's client shall file a declartion re additional heirs.
